stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true?

options.a: With an A1A modulated wave you can hear the wave in FRQ mode.
options.b: With an A2A unmodulated wave you can hear the wave in BFO mode.
options.c: With an A2A modulated wave you can hear the wave in ADF mode.
options.d: With N0N modulated wave you can hear the wave in BFO mode.
